title: Microbiocidal oxadiazole derivatives
abstract: Compounds of the formula (I), wherein the substituents are as defined in claim 1, useful as a pesticides, especially as fungicides.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: wherein A 1 represents CR\ wherein R is hydrogen, halogen, methyl, ethyl, difluoromethyl, trifluoromethyl, methoxy, ethoxy, or difluoromethoxy; A 2 represents CR 2 , wherein R 2 is hydrogen, halogen, methyl, ethyl, difluoromethyl, trifluoromethyl, methoxy, ethoxy, or difluoromethoxy; 3 A 3 represents CR 3 , wherein R 3 is hydrogen or halogen; A 4 represents CR 4 , wherein R 4 is hydrogen or halogen; wherein at least one of A 1 , A 2 , A 3 , or A 4 is not C-H; R 5 represents hydrogen, Ci-4alkyl, Cs ealkenyl, Cs ealkynyl, Ci-4haloalkyl, Ci-4alkoxy, Ci- 2alkoxyCi-4alkyl; R 6 represents Ci-ealkyl, Cs ealkenyl, Cs ealkynyl, Ci-4haloalkyl, Cs ehaloalkenyl, Ci-4alkoxy, Ci- 4alkoxyCi-4alkyl, hydroxyCi-4alkyl, hydroxyCi-4haloalkyl, cyanoCi-4alkyl, Ci-4alkoxyamino, N-Ci- 4alkoxyaminoCi-4alkyl, N-Ci-4alkoxy-N-Ci-4alkylamino, N-Ci-4alkoxy-N-Ci-4alkylaminoCi-4alkyl, Ci- 4alkylamino, N,N-di-Ci-4alkylamino, N,N-di-Ci-4alkylaminoCi-4alkyl, Cs ealkenoxyamino, C3- 6alkenoxyaminoCi-4alkyl, N-C3-6alkenoxy-N-Ci-4alkylamino; or a salt or an N-oxide thereof. 2. A compound according to claim 1 , wherein A 1 is CR 1 , wherein R is chloro, fluoro or methyl, and A 2 to A 4 are C-H. 3. A compound according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein R 5 is hydrogen. 4. A compound according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein R 6 is Ci-4alkyl, C3-4alkenyl, C3- 4alkynyl, Ci-4haloalkyl, C3-4haloalkenyl, Ci-4alkoxy, Ci-2alkoxyCi-4alkyl, hydroxyCi-2alkyl, hydroxyd- 4haloalkyl, cyanoCi-4alkyl, Ci-2alkoxyamino, N-Ci-2alkoxyaminoCi-4alkyl, N-Ci-2alkoxy-N-Ci- 5 4alkylamino, N-Ci-2alkoxy-N-Ci-2alkylaminoCi-2alkyl, Ci-2alkylamino, N,N-di-Ci-2alkylamino, N,N-di-Ci- 2alkylaminoCi-2alkyl, Cs ealkenoxyamino, C3-4alkenyloxyaminoCi-2alkyl, N-C3-6alkenoxy-N-Ci- 4alkylamino. 5. A compound according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein R 6 is Ci-4alkyl, Ci-4haloalkyl, Ci- 10 4alkoxy, Ci-2alkoxyCi-4alkyl, hydroxyCi-4haloalkyl, cyanoCi-4alkyl, N-Ci-2alkoxy-N-Ci-4alkylamino, C3- 6alkenoxyamino, N-C3-6alkenoxy-N-Ci-4alkylamino. 6. A compound according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein R 6 is Ci-4alkyl, Ci-2haloalkyl, Ci- 4alkoxy, Ci-2alkoxyCi-4alkyl, hydroxyCi-4haloalkyl, cyanoCi-2alkyl, N-Ci-2alkoxy-N-Ci-2alkylamino, C3- 15 4alkenoxyamino, N-C3-4alkenoxy-N-Ci-2alkylamino. 7. A compound according to any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein R 6 is methyl, ethyl, n-propyl, iso- propyl, n-butyl, iso-butyl, sec-butyl, tert-butyl, methoxy, ethoxy, n-propoxy, iso-propoxy, trifluoromethyl, 2,2,2-trifluoroethyl, methoxymethyl, methoxyethyl, methoxypropyl, ethoxymethyl, 20 ethoxyethyl, (l -methoxymethyl)propyl, (l -methyl)methoxymethyl, 1-chloro-2-hydroxymethyl-prop-2-yl, cyanomethyl, N-methoxy-N-methylamino, allyloxyamino, (2-methyl)allyloxyamino, N-allyloxy-N- methylamino. 8. A compound according to any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein R 6 is methyl, ethyl, iso-propyl, 25 sec-butyl, ethoxy, 2,2,2-trifluoroethyl, methoxyethyl, methoxypropyl, (l -methoxymethyl)propyl, (1- methyl)methoxymethyl, (1-chloro-2-hydroxymethyl)prop-2-yl, cyanomethyl, N-methoxy-N-methylamino, allyloxyamino, (2-methyl)allyloxyamino, N-allyloxy-N-methylamino. 9. An agrochemical composition comprising a fungicidally effective amount of a compound of 30 formula (I) according to any one of claims 1 to 8. 10. The composition according to claim 9, further comprising at least one additional active ingredient and/or an agrochemically-acceptable diluent or carrier. 35 11. A method of controlling or preventing infestation of useful plants by phytopathogenic microorganisms, wherein a fungicidally effective amount of a compound of formula (I) according to any of claims 1 to 8, or a composition comprising this compound as active ingredient, is applied to the plants, to parts thereof or the locus thereof. 40 12. Use of a compound of formula (I) according to any one of claims 1 to 8 as a fungicide.
